title: Anti Cactus
description: Stop items from vanishing when they touch a cactus. Add new item tag 'immune_to_cactus'
body:
Stop items from vanishing when they touch a cactus.
Add new item tag 
```
"minecraft:immune_to_cactus"
```



Immune Item List


```Netherite Scrap
Netherite Ingot
Netherite Block
Netherite Helmet
Netherite Chestplate
Netherite Leggins 
Netherite Boots
Netherite Sword
Netherite Pickaxe
Netherite Axe 
Netherite Shovel
Netherite  Hoe
Ancient Debris
```

Q&A

Will this mod be available on Forge?
- No

Will this mod be backported to older versions?

- Sure, If request
